delay_seconds.description: Wait N seconds before locking (0 = immediate)

tools.description: Search the web for information
Fetches and extracts readable content from a public webpage
Performs deep web research by searching, scraping top results, and summarizing the findings.
Get current status of the agent
Summarize AI-related content like logs, conversations, or documents

summary.description: This must be max 2 3 sentences covering the main points of the content as this is for text to speech in humatic way.

formatted_content.description: This can be upt max 10 sentences as this clears up and give information deep.

messaging.description: Send messages, files, media and make calls across platforms (WhatsApp, Facebook, Slack). Platform resolved from user preferences or explicit override.

tools.description: Send a text message to a contact

contact.description: Contact name to send message to

platform.description: Platform: auto (from user prefs), whatsapp, facebook, slack. - (if user has no preference, default to whatsapp)

tools.description: Send a document or file (PDF, ZIP, DOCX, etc.) to a contact

contact.description: Contact name to send file to

tools.description: Send a photo or video to a contact

contact.description: Contact name to send media to

media_path.description: Absolute path to photo or video

tools.description: Start an audio call with a contact
Start a video call with a contact

media.description: Direct music playback via mpv+yt-dlp (online) or local file. System-level audio tracking via pactl / CoreAudio / WASAPI.

tools.description: Play music immediately — streams YouTube/SoundCloud via mpv+yt-dlp with no browser, or plays a local audio file. Audio starts in the background automatically.

artist.description: Artist or band — improves search match

file_path.description: Absolute path to local audio file — required only when source='local'

session_id.description: ID to track this session for stop/status control

tools.description: Stop one or all active music sessions launched by music_play.

stop_all.description: Stop every active session at once

tools.description: Two-layer audio status: (1) our tracked sessions with full metadata, (2) OS-level scan of every process emitting audio via pactl / CoreAudio / WASAPI.

session_id.description: Filter our sessions to one ID. Omit to list all.

include_system.description: Run OS-level audio scan (pactl / CoreAudio / WASAPI)

system_audio.description: streams[] array + total + optional error note

tools.description: Pause an active playback session by suspending the player process. Audio stops immediately; position is preserved. Resume with music_resume.

progress.description: elapsed / remaining at moment of pause

tools.description: Resume a paused playback session. Accumulated pause time is tracked so progress remains accurate.

gmail.description: Gmail operations — list, read, send, reply, delete, trash, mark read/unread, search, label, move, and bulk-organize emails.

tools.description: List emails from the mailbox with optional label and query filters

label_ids.description: Gmail label IDs to filter by e.g. ['INBOX','UNREAD']

emails.description: List of email summaries (id, thread_id, labels, snippet, from, to, subject, date, is_read)

tools.description: Fetch the full content (headers, body, attachments) of a single email by ID
Compose and send a new email
Reply to an existing email within the same thread

message_id.description: ID of the message to reply to

tools.description: Permanently delete an email — IRREVERSIBLE. Use email_trash for a safer alternative

metadata.default_approval_question: Permanently delete this email? This cannot be undone.

tools.description: Move an email to Trash (recoverable within 30 days)
Mark one or more emails as read
Mark one or more emails as unread
Search emails using full Gmail search syntax

query.description: Gmail search query e.g. 'from:alice subject:invoice has:attachment'

tools.description: Add or remove labels on a single email (supports system labels like STARRED, IMPORTANT and custom ones)

add_labels.description: Label names or IDs to add

remove_labels.description: Label names or IDs to remove

tools.description: Move an email to a different label/folder by adding the destination label and removing source labels
Bulk-organize emails matching a search query. Actions: mark_read | mark_unread | archive | trash | label:<name> | unlabel:<name>

query.description: Gmail search query to select target emails

action.description: mark_read | mark_unread | archive | trash | label:<name> | unlabel:<name>

max_messages.description: Safety cap on how many emails are affected

metadata.default_approval_question: This will apply the action to multiple emails matching the query. Continue?

tools.description: List all Gmail labels (system + user-created) with unread counts
Get current weather conditions at user location

lat.description: Latitude — auto-detected from IP if omitted

lon.description: Longitude — auto-detected from IP if omitted

tools.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast at user location

lat.description: Latitude — auto-detected from IP if omitted

lon.description: Longitude — auto-detected from IP if omitted
